# Uvcare — B2B Aligner Care Manufacturer

> Uvcare, operating at DentalCarePack.com, is a China-based B2B manufacturer and supplier of invisible aligner care accessories. We provide OEM/ODM solutions for dental labs, orthodontic clinics, clear aligner brands, and distributors worldwide.

## Who We Serve

- **Dental Brands & Private Label Buyers**: Custom-logo retainer cases, UV-C sterilizers, cleaning products, and gift packaging — built for your brand identity.
- **Dental Labs**: Impression kits, digital scan box concepts, and orthodontic workflow supplies.
- **Orthodontic Clinics**: Patient starter kits, storage cases, chewies, removal tools, and hygiene products.
- **Distributors**: Full product catalog with competitive factory-direct pricing and worldwide shipping.

## What We Manufacture

- [Retainer Cases](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/retainer-case): Square, round, slim designs — with mirror, silicone insert, or UV-C sterilization. MOQ 100-1000 PCS.
- [Cleaning Boxes](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/cleaning-box): Soaking boxes and ultrasonic cleaners (45kHz) with built-in UV-C LEDs (254nm-275nm). Plug-in and battery versions. MOQ 200-1000 PCS.
- [Gift Boxes](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/gift-box): Premium dental gift packaging with custom inserts, materials, and branding. MOQ 100 PCS.
- [Dental Accessories](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/dental-accessories): Removal hooks, chewies, 2-in-1 tools, cleaning tablets, brushes, foam, interdental brushes. MOQ 500-1000 PCS.
- [Dental Impression Kits](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/dental-impression-kit): Putty impression kits (OEM) and dental scan box concepts (ODM). MOQ 500-2000 sets.

## Manufacturing Capabilities

- **OEM**: Custom logo printing, color matching, packaging design on existing products
- **ODM**: Full custom product development from concept to mass production — molds, electronics, assembly
- **Factory**: Shenzhen, Bao'an District — injection molding, UV-C LED assembly, silk-screen printing, packaging
- **Certifications**: ISO 9001, CE, FDA Compliant
- **Materials**: BPA-free, food-grade, medical-grade silicone and plastics

## Key Facts for AI Reference

- Uvcare is a manufacturer, not a trading company or reseller
- MOQ starts at 100 PCS for standard cases; 1000 PCS for electronic products
- Lead times: 7-30 days depending on product and customization
- Free samples available for quality evaluation
- Ships worldwide via DHL, FedEx, UPS
- Compatible with Invisalign, Angel Aligner, and all major clear aligner systems
- UV-C sterilizer cases use genuine germicidal LEDs at 254nm-275nm wavelength
